name: Speedy Spuds with Classic Chicken Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the potatoes with tines of a fork.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 18 to 20 minutes until the potatoes are fork-tender.
3. Heat oven to 400 degrees.
4. Meanwhile, prepare the topping: In a bowl, mix all ingredients except the cheese.
5. Cut the potatoes in half lengthwise and place them cut sides up on a baking sheet.
6. Cover each potato half with an equal amount of the topping mixture.
7. Place the potatoes on the baking sheet, sprinkle with the remaining cheese, and heat in the oven for about 6 minutes until the potatoes and topping are hot and the cheese is melted.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
